DP.458.0001:
The only items you ever throw are
Poké Balls!\f
But is that true?!
I want people to think about that.\f
That’s why I give away the Technical
Machine Fling.\f
DP.458.0002:
Using that move, the Pokémon hurls
whatever item it’s holding at the foe.\f
The move’s effect depends on what
item is hurled.\f
Remember, the move Fling fails if the
Pokémon isn’t holding anything.
DP.458.0003:
When I first started fishing, catching
anything made me happy.\f
But those days are long gone now...\f
Now I get annoyed if I can’t beat my
record by even an inch...
DP.458.0004:
I can’t explain it.
I get more easily agitated at night.
DP.458.0008:
Pokémon Size Contest
Big Pokémon Wanted!
